query: Apple Google Gemini multi-year partnership announcement date 2026

{"query":"Apple Google Gemini multi-year partnership announcement date 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1328,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://blog.google/company-news/inside-google/company-announcements/joint-statement-google-apple/","title":"Joint statement from Google and Apple","content":"Apple and Google have entered into a multi-year collaboration under which the next generation of Apple Foundation Models will be based on Google's Gemini models and cloud technology.
These models will help power future Apple Intelligence features, including a more personalized Siri coming this year."},{"url":"https://www.cnbc.com/2026/01/12/apple-google-ai-siri-gemini.html","title":"Apple picks Google's Gemini to run AI-powered Siri coming this year","content":"Apple is joining forces with Google to power its artificial intelligence features, including a major Siri upgrade expected later this year.
Google referred CNBC to the joint statement.
In August, Bloomberg reported that Apple was in early talks with Google to use a custom Gemini model to power a new iteration of Siri.
But that lucrative partnership briefly came into question after Google was found to hold an illegal internet search monopoly.
In October, Google CEO Sundar Pichai said the company's cloud segment signed more deals worth over $1 billion through the third quarter of 2025 than the previous two years combined."},{"url":"https://introl.com/blog/apple-google-gemini-partnership-siri-ai-infrastructure-2026","title":"Apple-Google Gemini Partnership | Introl Blog","content":"Apple will pay Google approximately $1 billion annually to license a custom 1.2 trillion parameter Gemini model—eight times larger than Apple's current cloud-based models—to power the next generation of Siri and Apple Intelligence features.1 The January 12, 2026 announcement marks the most significant shift in foundation model strategy since Apple launched Apple Intelligence in 2025.
Neither Apple nor Google officially confirmed the price, but Bloomberg's Mark Gurman reported the $1 billion annual figure in November 2025.8
The new Siri iteration targets spring 2026 release via iOS 26.4.38"},{"url":"https://tech-insider.org/apple-google-gemini-siri-deal-1-billion-2026/","title":"Apple's $1B Gemini Deal: Google AI Replaces Siri [2026]","content":"This model is eight times larger than Apple’s existing 150 billion parameter cloud models and uses a mixture-of-experts (MoE) architecture optimized for tasks like summarization, planning, and natural language understanding.
Feature — Siri (Gemini-Powered) — Google Assistant — Amazon Alexa — Samsung Bixby (Galaxy AI)
Meta and Amazon each committed tens of billions more.
Amazon has accelerated its integration of Anthropic’s Claude models into Alexa, seeking to differentiate through a partnership with a different frontier model provider.
Dan Ives at Wedbush Securities raised his Apple price target following the announcement, stating: “This deal turns a weakness into a strength.
Google’s Gemini now powers AI on iOS, Android, and Samsung Galaxy AI.
Anthropic’s Claude drives features in Amazon’s Alexa and AWS services.
The Apple Google Gemini deal is a multi-year partnership announced on January 12, 2026, where Apple licenses Google’s Gemini AI models to power a rebuilt Siri and enhanced Apple Intelligence features.
The first Gemini-powered Siri features are expected to arrive with iOS 26.4 in spring 2026.
Gene Munster at Deepwater Asset Management estimates the total multi-year deal value at up to $5 billion."},{"url":"https://camphouse.io/news/apple-google-gemini-ai-deal","title":"Google and Apple Strike Multi-Year AI Deal to Power Siri and More | Camphouse","content":"The deal shows a new openness to licensed AI technology from another major tech player.
That includes APIs and system hooks that bring advanced AI into third-party apps."}]}

In January 2026, Apple and Google announced a notable shift in the AI landscape with a multi year partnership that will see Google Gemini power a major Siri upgrade later in the year Image 1: 📱Image 2: 🤝. Under the agreement, Google Gemini will serve as the foundational layer for Apple Intelligence features tied to the redesigned Siri. Apple said the integration will adhere to its privacy standards, with Gemini models running on Apple’s Private Cloud Compute infrastructure and on device hardware rather than standard Google servers. The partnership is widely viewed as a strategic gain for Google, giving Gemini access to more than two billion active Apple devices worldwide. The deal also positions Gemini as the primary backend for Apple’s core AI features, following Apple’s earlier partnership with OpenAI to support ChatGPT for general knowledge queries.","score":0.90810597,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://blog.google/company-news/inside-google/company-announcements/joint-statement-google-apple","title":"Joint statement from Google and Apple","content":"# Joint statement from Google and Apple. Get the latest news from Google in your inbox.","score":0.8868231,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://mexicobusiness.news/cloudanddata/news/apple-will-use-google-gemini-ai-power-next-gen-siri-2026","title":"Apple Will Use Google Gemini AI to Power Next-Gen Siri ...","content":"Apple Will Use Google Gemini AI to Power Next-Gen Siri by 2026. Apple and Google have initiated a multi-year partnership to integrate Gemini AI models into the forthcoming evolution of Siri. This collaboration uses Google cloud technology to power Apple Foundation Models and Apple Intelligence features scheduled for deployment in late 2026. Apple determined that the scalability of the infrastructure provided by Google is necessary to support the complex reasoning tasks required for the next generation of its digital assistant. \"After careful evaluation, we determined that Google’s technology provides the most capable foundation for Apple Foundation Models and we are excited about the innovative new experiences it will unlock for our users,\" reads an official statement by both companies. This decision follows a period where Apple remained on the sidelines of the Generative AI sector while competitors such as Amazon, Meta Platforms, and Microsoft invested billions of dollars in infrastructure. Following the news of the partnership, the market capitalization of Alphabet, the parent company of Google, reached US$4 trillion.","score":0.8858788,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://apple.gadgethacks.com/news/apple-chooses-googles-gemini-ai-for-new-siri-in-2026","title":"Apple Chooses Google's Gemini AI for New Siri in 2026 << Apple :: Gadget Hacks","content":"# Apple Chooses Google's Gemini AI for New Siri in 2026. When Google's Gemini AI announced its Personal Intelligence feature on Jan. 14, 2026, it seemed like just another AI upgrade. Apple, after years of struggling with Siri's limitations, made a decision that sent shockwaves through Silicon Valley: they're handing over the keys to their voice assistant to Google's advanced AI technology. Google's latest Personal Intelligence launch represents something truly significant — it's a preview of what Siri is about to become. This breakthrough allows Gemini to tap into personal data across Google apps like Gmail, Photos, Search, and YouTube for enhanced contextual understanding, setting the stage for what Apple users will experience when these same capabilities power their iPhone assistant with Apple's signature privacy protections. This multi-year collaboration means Google's Gemini models and cloud infrastructure will power the next generation of Apple's AI features.","score":0.8455478,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.21,"request_id":"1daa4f90-0e25-4d6e-b590-c99ed26d2168"}
